_note: STEP 1 (join-ceiling) annotation. One node per manifest requirement planKey. produces/consumes are authored from each component's GENUINE semantics over the lattice (eval/lattice.mjs) — what artifact does this packet actually read and write — NOT reverse-engineered from the target requiredEdges. Resources flow through their real owner (e.g. the client secret reaches the token exchange THROUGH provider-config, so callback-handler consumes Config:provider, not Credential:client-secret directly — modelling it otherwise would manufacture a spurious callback->secret-management edge). The ceiling = how many of the manifest's required edges fall out of the deterministic join over this honest annotation. Edges that do NOT fall out reveal which deps are not resource-mediated (pure flow/ordering/containment).
